original_image_tags: Bar graph titled "Figure 38. Delta Launch Summary" plotting "Number of Delta Missions" (y-axis, linear scale from 0 to 16) against "Launch Year" (x-axis, ranging from 55 to 95, i.e., 1955-1995). The legend indicates solid black bars represent "Normal Performance" and clear white segments represent "Failure/Anomaly". The graph shows annual launch counts with a visible peak in the early 1970s.

elements.description: Figure 38. Delta Launch Summary. A stacked bar chart showing the 'Number of Delta Missions' (y-axis, 0-16) by 'Launch Year' (x-axis, 55-95). The legend indicates 'Failure/Anomaly' (clear white tops of bars) and 'Normal Performance' (solid black blocks).

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the chart title, axis labels, scale, legend categories, and overall visual content without contradiction.
